examples: His father is teaching her to use adze.
Stone implements included adze, arrowhead and grinder.
Among them boat or cuneiformed cores and stone tools such as long scrapers with round edges, engravers and adze-shaped blades are found largely.
He was killed with a single blow from the wide end - or adze - of the axe.
Equipped with nothing more than a length of rope and a carpenter's adze, Shackleton and two crew-members successfully completed the journey in 36 sleepless hours.
